analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize a cover photo showcasing the backyard or outdoor space if available—this room type generates 37% higher engagement in high-end properties per market data, given golfers' preference for visualizing recreation space.
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate is £1000.0, +967% above median £154.60, but occupancy remains 85.9% booked vs cohort median 47.8%—title fails to justify premium pricing
